zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Wakeman於1503年出生在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特時，他的父親William Wakeman38歲，母親Eleanor Clarke34歲。他於1524年與Joan Haselwood在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年在英國武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Wakeman于1503年出生在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特时，他的父亲William Wakeman38岁，母亲Eleanor Clarke34岁。他于1524年与Joan Haselwood在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1552年在英国武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wakeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wakeman ‘watchman, town guard’, also ‘municipal officer responsible for night-time security and the town musicians’. Wakeman was the title of the chief magistrate of the borough of Ripon until 1604, when it was changed to mayor. He was the head of the body of wakemen whose duty was to blow a cow's horn every night at nine o'clock. If between then and sunrise any burglary took place, it was made good at the public charge. See also Watchman .

variants.name: Watchman
meanings: Native American (Navajo): from English watchman, probably used as a translation of a Navajo term for this occupation, ha'asídí.
English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English waccheman ‘watchman, guard, sentry’, also used as a nickname for a person characterised by wakefulness. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Watchorn
meanings: English (East Midlands, especially Leicestershire): nickname apparently from Middle English wache ‘vigil, wake, watch’ (Old English wacce) + horn ‘horn’. Compare the discussion of Wakeman .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Wakeman was born in 1503, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, his father, William Wakeman, was 38 and his mother, Eleanor Clarke, was 34. He married Joan Haselwood in 1524, in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1552, in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Wakeman est né en 1503, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Wakeman, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Clarke, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Joan Haselwood en 1524, à Drayton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1552, à Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Wakeman 1503 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wakeman 38 und seine Mutter Eleanor Clarke 34. Er hat 1524 in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Joan Haselwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1552 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Wakeman è nato il nel 1503 nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, William Wakeman, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Clarke, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Joan Haselwood nel 1524, nel Drayton, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1552, nel Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Wakemanが1503年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで生まれた時，父William Wakemanは38歳，母Eleanor Clarkeは34歳であった。1524年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドレイトンでJoan Haselwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアチャッドエスリー コルベットで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Wakeman(이)가 1503년 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wakeman(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Clarke(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Joan Haselwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 영국 워스스터실르 채데슬리 코벳에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Wakeman nasceu em 1503, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Wakeman, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Clarke, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Haselwood em 1524, em Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1552, em Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Wakeman родился в 1503 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wakeman было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Clarke, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Haselwood в 1524 г. в местности дреитон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1552 г. в местности чэддесли корбетт, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Wakeman nació en 1503, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Wakeman, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Eleanor Clarke, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Joan Haselwood en 1524, en Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1552, en Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
